text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. It was definitely more complex than I
thought it'd be.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But, as for the plushie... I haven't touched one in
a long time...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This one does seem like the one I used to have... I
think I even gave it a name...
